styleHead: STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation
castCountLine: CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.
actionText: INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. Candle. A tub. THE NARRATOR works in silence-working in methodical silence: head, arms, legs. No flourish; method. He lifts three planks from the flooring, deposits the contents between the scantlings, replaces the boards. Smooths the seams. Inspects: no stain. The tub has caught all. He almost laughs. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "There was nothing to wash out-no stain of any kind — no blood — spot whatever.". Character_The_Narrator still wears white shirtsleeves rolled up, dark trousers, barefoot Camera directive: Wide shot of clean chamber floor and tub, 24mm anamorphic, static locked frame revealing no stain whatever. Performance: Acting intensity 6/10: Relieved soft smile, darting inspecting eyes, calm satisfaction Optics: f/2.0 shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, deep charcoal shadows, warm amber candle highlights, muted crimson
prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: REQUIRED native Grok off-camera voiceover. Character_The_Narrator narrates exactly: "There was nothing to wash out-no stain of any kind — no blood — spot whatever.". Start speaking immediately with "There" — do not skip, delay, or swallow the opening word. After the last word, hold a brief natural pause with a closed mouth (about half a second); do not freeze mid-syllable or trail into empty staring. Do not lip-sync on-screen cast to this VO. Ambient/Foley: boards replace, planks lift, remains deposit, seams smooth. VOICE LOCK Character_The_Narrator: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.
